**Summary:**

The 'Maldives - The Residence at Falhumaafushi' package is a 5-day tour to the beautiful Maldives, offering an unforgettable experience of relaxation and adventure. This all-inclusive package includes:

* A 4-night stay in a Beach Villa (No Pool) at The Residence at Falhumaafushi
* Meals on an all-inclusive basis
* Return domestic flight and speedboat transfers
* Green Tax and travel insurance (up to the age of 60 years) for the travel duration
* Complimentary services, including:
	+ Free upgrade to a Water Villa (No Pool) or Water Villa with Pool, subject to availability
	+ 1 time 90 minutes Sunset Dolphin Cruise per person per stay
* Honeymoon freebies, including:
	+ A bottle of wine on arrival
	+ A romantic in-villa bath setup (once during stay)
	+ Enjoy 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrive Male, check-in at the hotel, and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2-5:** Enjoy the day at leisure, exploring the island on your own.

**Day 5:** Depart Male, after breakfast, check out (standard 1200 hrs.) and transfer from the hotel to International Airport for the departure flight back to India or to your onwards destination.

**Inclusions:**

* 04 Night’s accommodation in Beach Villa (No Pool)
* Meal Plan as per selection – All Inclusive
* Return Domestic Flight + Speedboat transfers
* Green Tax
* Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Complimentary:**

* Free Upgrade Beach Villa (No Pool) to Water Villa (No Pool) based on Subject to availability
* Free Upgrade Beach Villa with Pool to Water Villa with Pool based on Subject to availability
* 1 time 90 minutes Sunset Dolphin Cruise per person per stay

**Honeymoon Freebies:**

* A bottle of wine on arrival
* A romantic in-villa bath set-up (once during stay)
* Enjoy 15% discount off Ala Carte Treatment at The Spa by Clarins

**Exclusions:**

* TCS & GST
* International Airfare & Visa Charges
* Guaranteed early check-in or late check-out
* Any expenses of personal nature
* Tips and porterage
* Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary.
* Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
* RT-PCR Test
* Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list

**Room Configuration:**

* Beach Villa: 2 Ad + 1 CNB OR 2 Adult
* Water Villa: 3 Adults

**Terms and Conditions:**

* Information regarding the above complimentary services must be informed at the time of reservation and must be clearly marked on the client’s original voucher.
* Wedding should be no older than 12 months to entitle the Honeymoon benefits.

**Cancellation Policy:**

* Cancellation fee will not be charged if booking is cancelled 15 days prior to the date of arrival.
* Cancellations within 15 to 8 days prior to the date of arrival 75% of the total will be charged.
* Cancellation within 10 days and below to the date of arrival, No Show bookings and cancellations within the stay will be charged for the total stay on the basis booked.

**Payment Policy:**

* For All travel Period Excluding 24th Dec’20 to 8th Jan’21: 100% Payment is to be paid 21 days prior to the Check in.
* For travel Period 24th Dec’20 to 8th Jan’21: 100% Payment is to be paid 60 days prior to the check in.

Note: The package price is valid as mentioned 17 Dec 2020 – 19 Dec 2020. CIL reserves the right to change departure dates given the airline seat availability changes. The upgrade hotel/villa prices are subject to availability at the time of booking. The upgrade hotel/villa prices DO NOT GURANTEE rooms at the envisaged hotels/Villa. The upgrade hotel/villa rooms are subject to availability at the time of booking.

**Summary:**

The 'Discover Jeddah' package is a 4-day tour that covers the beautiful city of Jeddah in Saudi Arabia. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Old Jeddah, Al-Balad, and Jeddah Corniche, as well as a trip to the Taif Tour, where you can enjoy the majestic panoramic view of Al Hatta Mountain. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to the House of Islamic Art Museum, Jeddah Waterfront, and a Rose Farm and perfume factory.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Jeddah, Meals: N/A
- Arrive in Jeddah and get transferred to your hotel.
- Check-in to your hotel and freshen up.
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure and do a little bit of exploring on your own.

**Day 2:** Jeddah, Meals: Breakfast
- Half Day City Tour Of Jeddah (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit the Old Jeddah, Al-Balad, and Jeddah Corniche.
- Visit the House of Islamic Art Museum.
- Lunch at leisure.
- In the afternoon, visit Jeddah Waterfront.

**Day 3:** Taif, Meals: Lunch
- Full Day Taif Tour With Lunch (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit the Al Hatta Mountain and Rose Farm and perfume factory.
- Visit Al Kaki Palace.
- Lunch at leisure.
- Enjoy the scenic drive to the Taif Tour.

**Day 4:** Jeddah, Meals: Breakfast
- Departure:
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Enjoy some free time depending on your flight time (if applicable) and check out from the hotel.

**Inclusions:**

- 03 nights’ accommodation in Jeddah as per the selection
- Daily breakfast except on day 1
- Meals as mentioned in the itinerary
- Airport transfers on PVT basis
- All sightseeing and entrance fees as per the itinerary
- All taxes
- Travel Insurance (Valid till the age of 59 Yrs.)

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- Visa charges
- Departure PCR test, if applicable
- All flights services
- Meals not mentioned in the itinerary
- Any tips for guide & Driver
- Anything not mentioned in the inclusions
- Pre & Post tour services & cost
- Expenditure of a personal nature (Such as uses of Mini – Bar & Refrigerator, laundry service, telephone call, camera fee, tips & Etc )
- All drink and beverages
- Hotel promotional rates not valid during Black out Period / Surcharge Dates / Stop Sales on Hotel
- The rates are valid for minimum 02 adults travelling together at all times.

**Summary:** The 'Uttar Pradesh - Varanasi, Prayagraj with Chitrakoot Day Trip' package is a 6-day tour that covers the sacred cities of Varanasi and Prayagraj in Uttar Pradesh. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Annapurna Mandir, and Bada Hanuman Mandir, as well as a day trip to Chitrakoot, a tranquil retreat on the banks of the river Paisuni. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a boating experience on the River Ganges in Varanasi.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Varanasi, Meals: N/A
- Arrival at Varanasi airport, transfer to hotel
- Evening transfer to Ganges for Boating & evening Ganga Aarti on famous Dashashwamedh Ghat

**Day 2:** Varanasi, Meals: Breakfast
- Temple darshan (Kashi Vishwanath, Annapurna Mandir, Kala Bhairov Mandir)
- Sankat Mochan Mandir, Durga Mandir, Tulsi Manas Mandir & Benaras Hindu University (BHU)
- Sightseeing of Sarnath including Sarnath Museum (Our National Emblem excavated from Sarnath is on Display built by Samrat Ashoka), Ancient ruins, Mahabodhi society Temple

**Day 3:** Prayagraj, Meals: Breakfast
- Day trip to Allahabad (130 KM 3 Hrs. approx. one way)
- HOLY DIP IN SANGAM, Bada Hanuman Mandir, Akshayvat Tree, Anand Bhawan (Birthplace of first Prime Minister of Independent India Pt. Jawaharlal Nehru)

**Day 4:** Prayagraj, Meals: Breakfast
- Day trip to Chitrakoot (120 KM, 3 Hrs. approx. one way)
- Kamad Giri, Sphatik Shila, Hanuman Dhara, Ram Ghat, Janki Kund

**Day 5:** Varanasi, Meals: Breakfast
- Allahabad – Varanasi (130 KM, 3 Hrs. approx. one way)
- Overnight in Varanasi

**Day 6:** Varanasi, Meals: Breakfast
- Checkout from hotel and drop at Varanasi airport for onward/return journey

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation on DBL/TWIN sharing basis In mentioned or similar hotels
- Insurance For All Pax Under 70 Years
- Breakfast
- Airport arrival and Departure
- All transfer and sightseeing by 01 Private vehicles as per the tour itinerary
- Boating on River Ganges (Varanasi) once during the stay by Hand Boat

**Exclusions:**

- Any airfare/rail fare
- Guide service/charge
- Remittance charge/Bank charge for transfer of money
- Tips and gratuities
- Any entrance/monuments fees/mobile/ camera/video tickets
- Meals other than mentioned
- Any VIP darshan/Dakshina/Prashad/Garland fees
- Any personal nature expenses
- GST Extra
- Personal expenditure like soft drinks, mineral water, phone calls, tips, porter age etc.
- Anything not specifically mentioned in the “Package tour price includes” box.

**Summary:** The 'Spiti - Journey to the Hidden Himachal' package is a 6-day tour that covers the beautiful and rugged regions of Spiti and Lahaul in the state of Himachal Pradesh, India. The itinerary includes visits to the highest motorable pass in the world, Kunzum Pass, the Ajanta of Himalayas, the Tabo monastery, and the serene Chandratal Lake. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including visits to local villages, monasteries, and the stunning natural beauty of the region. The tour concludes with a drive back to Manali via the Atal Tunnel.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Manali - Kaza, Meals: Dinner, Description: 
Drive from Manali to Kaza via Kunzum Pass, with a visit to the villages of Langza, Hikim, and Comik.

**Day 2:** Kaza, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Drive to Tabo, visiting the Dhankar monastery and Tabo monastery, one of the oldest and most precious Buddhist paintings.

**Day 3:** Kaza, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Drive to Mud Village and visit Pin Valley, then back to Kaza.

**Day 4:** Kaza, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Excursion to Kee monastery and Kibber village, then drive to Chandratal Lake via Kunzum Pass.

**Day 5:** Chandratal, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Visit the Chandratal Lake, believed to have been discovered by traders from Tibet or Ladakh.

**Day 6:** Chandratal - Manali, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Drive back to Manali via the Atal Tunnel, concluding the tour.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in the mentioned or similar hotels.
- Daily breakfast & Dinner at all places.
- Rest of the Meals, if any, as per the above.
- All transfers and sightseeing by AC Vehicle.
- All toll taxes, parking charges, driver allowances.
- All currently applicable hotel taxes except GST @ Current Rate.

**Exclusions:**

- Any Air or Rail fare.
- Any other meal not mentioned in price includes.
- Any other destination not mentioned in itinerary.
- Any monument entrance fees, camera fees, guide charges.
- Any expenses of personal nature.
- GST @ Current Rate.

**Summary:** The 'Amazing Ladakh with Turtuk Excursion' package is a 8-day tour that explores the breathtaking landscapes of Ladakh, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Khardung La Pass, Pangong Lake, and Turtuk village, as well as a tour of the ancient monasteries of Ladakh. Participants will enjoy scenic drives, guided tours, and a range of exciting activities, including a boat ride on Pangong Lake and a visit to the famous Hemis Gompa monastery.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Leh, Meals: Dinner
- Arrive at Leh Kushok Bakula Airport and check-in at the hotel.
- Spend the day acclimatizing to the high altitude and exploring the city.

**Day 2:** Leh Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Sham Valley and start sightseeing with the Hall Of Fame, Gurudwara Patthar Sahib, Magnetic Hill, and Sangam - Confluence of Two Rivers.
- Visit Leh Palace and Shanti Stupa for panoramic views of Leh city and the surrounding mountains.

**Day 3:** Leh to Nubra Valley, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass, the highest motorable road in the world.
- Check-in at the camp or hotel in Hunder and explore the village.

**Day 4:** Nubra to Turtuk, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the last village on the Indian side of the border, Turtuk.
- Return to Nubra and enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 5:** Nubra to Pangong Lake, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive to Pangong Lake, the highest saltwater lake in the world.
- Enjoy the beauty of the lake and the surrounding mountains.

**Day 6:** Pangong to Leh, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Drive back to Leh and visit the Hemis Gompa monastery.
- Explore the city and its markets.

**Day 7:** Leh Excursion, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Visit the Thiksey Monastery, Shey Palace, and Sindhu Ghat.
- Enjoy the evening at leisure.

**Day 8:** Departure, Meals: Breakfast
- Bid farewell to the tour and depart from Leh.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Twin/Double sharing basis in starting room category at each place
- 07 breakfasts and 07 dinners
- Transportation by NAC Xylo / Scorpio / Innova (as per availability) for arrival / departure transfers and sightseeing as per the itinerary
- Assistance at the airport while arriving and departing
- Oxygen Cylinder in each vehicle while traveling to Nubra/Pangong Only
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)

**Mics. charges are inclusive of:**

- Ladakh Royalty Fee
- Inner-line permits
- Porterage at hotel and airport
- All applicable luxury/road taxes

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Airfares trainfare
- Any monastery entrance fees, Any Joy ride or rafting
- Medical expenses (apart from first aid) and insurance of any kind
- Tips, laundry, liquors, wines, mineral water, telephone charges, camera fee and items of personal nature
- Transportation is not on disposal basis. It is strictly as per the programme, any extra running will be charged extra
- Any expenses arising out of unforeseen circumstances like flight delay / cancellation / hike in fare, strike or any other natural calamities or any emergency evacuation expenses
- Any other item not mentioned in the cost includes section

**Summary:**

**Summary:** The 'Gangtok and Darjeeling With Taj Hotels' package is a 6-day tour that takes you through the beautiful cities of Gangtok and Darjeeling in the Eastern Himalayas. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, and the majestic Tshangu Lake. You'll also enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and exciting activities, including a half-day sightseeing of Japanese Temple, Peace Pagoda, Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park, and Darjeeling Ropeway Ride.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Gangtok, Meals: Dinner
- Arrival at NJP Station/Bagdogra Airport, meet and greet by our office Executive, and transfer to Gangtok (130 Kms / 04 Hrs).
- Overnight stay at the hotel in Gangtok.

**Day 2:** Gangtok, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Go for a full-day sightseeing covering Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology (Closed on Sunday), Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom (Closed on Sunday) and Flower Show.
- Overnight stay at the hotel in Gangtok.

**Day 3:** Gangtok, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- After breakfast, in the morning, start for excursion to Baba Mandir & Tshangu Lake - situated at a height of 12400Ft / 3780 Mts.
- Back to Gangtok and Overnight at Hotel. (In case of Land slide or any reason Tshangu Lake is closed we will provided alternate sightseeing).
- Overnight stay in Hotel at Gangtok.

**Day 4:** Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- After breakfast transfer to Darjeeling (7380 Ft / 2250 Mts, 115 Kms / 05 to 06 Hrs).
- Overnight at Hotel in Darjeeling.

**Day 5:** Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Early morning tour to Tiger Hills (8364 Ft / 2550 Mts at around 4 AM) to view sunrise over Kanchendzonga Peak (subject to clear weather).
- On way back visit Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop.
- After breakfast go for a half-day sightseeing of Japanese Temple, Peace pagoda, Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park & Himalayan Mountaineering Institute (Closed on Thursday), Darjeeling Ropeway Ride (Ticket cost not included & will be approx INR 180.00 per person) Tenzing & Gombu Rock, Tibetan Refugee Self-Help Center (Closed on Sunday) & panoramic view of Tea Estate.
- Overnight stay in Hotel at Darjeeling.

**Day 6:** Darjeeling, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast checkout of the hotel & Reach the Bagdogra Airport / Railway Station for your onward connection or way back home.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in the above mentioned hotel or similar category hotels / resorts.
- Daily breakfast and dinner included in the package.
- All transfers and sightseeing is based on MUV Vehicle (Marazzo / Ertiga / Xylo / Innova or Similar). (Ac will be switched off during Hilly drives)
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69 years).
- All toll taxes, parking charges, driver allowances.
- All currently applicable hotel taxes except GST as applicable.

**Exclusions:**

- Cost for Airfare, Train fare, Insurance Premiums, Rafting Charges
- Any other meal not mentioned in price includes.
- Any other destination not mentioned in itinerary.
- Any monument entrance fees, camera fees, guide charges.
- Any expenses of personal nature
- GST as applicable
- Extra Person / Child With Bed sharing the Room on mattress.
- Applicable Govt. service tax extra on total billing.

**Highlights of the package:**

The 'Gangtok and Darjeeling With Taj Hotels' package offers a mix of culture, adventure, and scenic beauty, making it an ideal choice for those looking to explore the Eastern Himalayas.

**Summary:** The 'Phuket - Buy 1 Get 1 Free' package is a 5-day tour that covers the beautiful island of Phuket in Thailand. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Phi Phi Island, Phuket city, and other scenic spots. Participants will enjoy guided tours, local sightseeing, and a range of exciting activities, including a half-day city tour and a speed boat tour to Phi Phi Island.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Phuket, Meals: N/A
- Arrive in Phuket, Phuket’s great advantage is that there's always something to do on and off the island whether it's raining or shining.

**Day 2:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast and Local Lunch
- Phuket: Phi Phi Island Tour on seat in coach basis.
- Visit Phi Phi islands, famous from the movie ‘The Beach” (2000) starring Leonardo DiCaprio.
- Witness the stunning mountainous scenery surrounding paradise lagoon and coves.
- Get lost in a lush green patch of the tropical trees.

**Day 3:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast
- Phuket: Half Day City Tour
- Visit Phuket Town for the local sightseeing, especially to see the Sino-Portuguese architecture.
- Visit the Chalong Temple (Wat – Chalong), a very famous temple amongst the monks since olden times.
- Drive pass through the Rawai Beach where a local Sea Gypsy’s Village is located.

**Day 4:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast
- Phuket - Day Free:
- Post breakfast at hotel, the day is Free at Leisure.
- You can avail one of the recommended optional tours.

**Day 5:** Phuket, Meals: Breakfast
- Depart Phuket:
- This morning after breakfast, you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Inclusions:**

- Sightseeing:
  - Phi Phi Island (Speed Boat) with Local Lunch
  - Phuket city Tour on seat in coach basis
- Transfers:
  - Arrival Transfer from Phuket Airport to Phuket Hotel on Private Basis.
  - Transfer from Phuket Hotel to Phuket Airport on Private Basis
- Insurance:
  - Travel Insurance - Valid for 7 days up to the age of 60 years with the coverage of USD 75,000 (Excluding US & Canada)

**Exclusions:**

- GST and TCS as applicable

- Tips and porter-age

- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Surcharges as applicable due to peak season, surcharge dates, trade fair dates, any block out dates
- Any services not mentioned in the inclusions list.

**Summary:** The 'Asadharan Italy - Durga Puja Special' package is a 9-day tour that covers the beautiful cities of Milan, Ferrara, Arezzo, Rome, Naples, Florence, and Cinque Terre in Italy. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Leaning Tower of Pisa, the Sistine Chapel, St. Mark's Square, and the Duomo, as well as a guided city tour of Venice, Florence, and Rome. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a boat tour of Capri Island and a visit to the Ferrari Museum. The tour also includes a visit to the Cinque Terre, a UNESCO World Heritage site.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Milan, Meals: Dinner
- Welcome to Milan!
- On arrival, our Tour Manager / Local Representative will meet and welcome you outside the airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Note: Joining direct passenger / NRI can check-in on your own at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Ferrara, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

**Summary:** The 'Beach Fun In Andaman' package is a 6-day tour that offers an exciting experience in the beautiful islands of Andaman. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Cellular Jail, Ross Island, North Bay Island, Radhanagar Beach, and Elephant Beach, as well as a range of exciting activities, including snorkeling, scuba diving, and water sports. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of activities, including a romantic dinner and photo and video stories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Port Blair, Meals: N/A
- Arrive Port Blair – Cellular Jail – Light and Sound Show
On arrive at Port Blair airport, our representative will receive and escorted to the hotel. After check-in at the hotel and little relax, visit the Cellular Jail (National Memorial). Light & Sound Show at Cellular Jail : At evening, we move for the Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail where the saga of the freedom struggle brought alive., GeoLocation: (Lat: 11.623377, Lon: 92.726483).

**Day 2:** Port Blair, Meals: Breakfast
- Port Blair – Ross Island – North Bay Island
Today, after breakfast we will proceed for a full day cruising towards Ross Island, & North Bay (Coral Island). Ross Island: First we starts the exhilarating journey (by boat) to Ross Island the erstwhile capital of Port Blair during the British regime, it now stands an imposing relic, with the structure almost in debris. A small museum displays photographs and other antiques of the Britishers, relevant to these islands. North Bay (Coral Island) : From Ross Island, we proceed for a joyful trip to North Bay island (Coral Island) offereing exotic coral, colorful fishes and underwater marine life., GeoLocation: (Lat: 11.623377, Lon: 92.726483).

**Day 3:** Havelock Island, Meals: Breakfast
- Port Blair (Corbyns Cove Beach) To Havelock
Morning we go to Corbyn’s Cove Beach – the most active beach side of Port Blair. Here we have multiple activities to do on direct payment basis. The Top Activity of Sea Kart (Can Be Prebooked), is a unique water craft shaped like a go kart; with a steering wheel and a paddle accelerator attached to the right of the steering; It is officially permitted for self-driving by customers; Seakart experience includes photography by an in house DSLR camera which is handed out to customers. We start our journey towards Havelock Island via ferry from Port Blair Harbor. On arrival at Havelock Island, our representative will receive and escort you to check-in to the resort. After relax, day free for own leisure at Havelock Island. Overnight stay at Havelock Island, GeoLocation: (Lat: 12.007127, Lon: 92.976664).

**Day 4:** Havelock Island, Meals: Breakfast
- Havelock – Elephant Beach and Radhanagar Beach
After breakfast, today early morning, will proceed to Elephant Beach by motorized boat which is famous for Water Sports Activities at Havelock. The Trip of Elephants Beach inclusive of Snorkeling for one occasion with equipment and Guide. Afternoon we proceed to Radhanagar Beach (Beach No. 7), the Times Magazine rated the finest beach among the best beaches in Asia. It is an ideal place for swimming, sea bathing and basking on the sun kissed beaches. Overnight in the Hotel., GeoLocation: (Lat: 12.007127, Lon: 92.976664).

**Day 5:** Port Blair, Meals: Breakfast
- Havelock Island – Port Blair – Shopping
Today morning proceed back towards Port Blair. On arrival at Port Blair, our representative will receive and escort you to check-in to the resort / hotel. After relax at evening, we proceed to Sagarika (the Govt. Emporium of Handcraft) for shopping. For Evening – Guest May Opt for Dinner Cruise which Can Be prebooked. Return check in at the hotel & overnight at the hotel., GeoLocation: (Lat: 11.623377, Lon: 92.726483).

**Day 6:** Port Blair, Meals: Breakfast
- Depart From Andaman Islands
Drop to Port Blair / Harbor for Return journey with a wonderful holiday memories., GeoLocation: (Lat: 11.623377, Lon: 92.726483).

**Summary:** The 'Highlights Of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu' package is an 8-day tour that takes you through the beautiful states of Karnataka and Tamil Nadu in India. This exciting journey covers a range of stunning locations, including Bangalore, Coorg, Mysore, Ooty, and Coimbatore. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Coorg's beautiful waterfalls, Mysore Palace, and the beautiful Botanical Garden in Ooty. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a boat ride and a visit to the Isha Yoga Center.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Bangalore, Meals: N/A
- Arrival at Bangalore airport/ railway station and proceed to the hotel.  Bangalore is the capital city of Karnataka state it is well known as Garden city.  Afternoon proceed for a half day city tour of Bangalore. Visit Lalbagh, Cubbon Park, ISKCON Temple, Vidhana Soudha and finally at Commercial Street for a bit of shopping. By evening return back to hotel and overnight stay at Bangalore.

**Day 2:** Coorg, Meals: Breakfast
- In the morning, after breakfast, check out the hotel and drive to Coorg - the "Scotland of Karnataka" nestled in the Western. On the way to Madikeri, visit Bylukuppe Tibetian Settlement and Kaveri Nisargadhama at Kushalanagar. On arrival check in to the hotel. Evening visit to Omkareshwara Temple - a temple having both Islamic and Gothic style of architecture and Raja Seat- a seasonal garden of flowers and artificial fountains. Arrive at hotel and overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 3:** Coorg, Meals: Breakfast
- Morning breakfast and proceed for the sightseeing for full day covering Talacauveri - located in the picturesque location of Brahmagiri hills. Talacauvery is the origin of River Kaveri, a beautiful Talacauvery Temple built around it, and then visit to Bhagamandala. Bhagamandala is famous for the confluence of the three sacred rivers, Kaveri, Sujyothi and Kanike. Visit to the temple dedicated to Bhagandeshwara (Lord Shiva). Return to the hotel for the lunch. After lunch, visit to Dubare Elephant camp, a forest camp on the banks of the River Kaveri where bathing and feeding the elephants are done. Dubare elephant camp in Coorg is the perfect destination to enjoy Elephant rides, bird watching and adventurous trekking. Arrive at hotel and overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 4:** Mysore, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast proceed to Mysore on the way visit Srirangapatna which was the capital of King Hyder Ali and his son Tippu Sultan. By noon at Mysore and check in to the hotel. Afternoon visit Mysore Palace, one of the major attractions of Mysore. Then to Mysore Zoo were you can see some of the rare species of wildlife. Evening proceed to world famous Brindavan Gardens expanded over 150 acres. The musical fountain and light show adds attraction to the gardens. Return back to the hotel and overnight stay.

**Day 5:** Ooty, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast check out hotel and proceed to Ooty passing through Bandipur. Check in at the hotel as you arrive in Ooty. Evening free for shopping and other activities and overnight stay at Ooty.

**Day 6:** Ooty, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast proceed for a site seeing tour of Ooty. Visit the Doddabeta Peak, Botanical garden, rose garden, Lake and Bat house. Overnight stay.

**Day 7:** Coimbatore, Meals: Breakfast
- After breakfast proceed to Coimbatore visit, Isha Yoga Center, Kovai Kutrralam, Marutamalai Murugan Temple. Overnight Stay.

**Day 8:** Coimbatore, Meals: Breakfast
- Morning after breakfast check out hotel and proceed to Coimbatore. On arrival drop at airport/ railway station for onward journey.

The 'Swiss Special' package is an 8-day tour that takes you through the picturesque cities of Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken, and Montreux in Switzerland. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Zurich City Tour, Mt Titlis, Mt Jungfraujoch, and Glacier 3000. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a Seal Island Boat Cruise and a Danube river cruise. The package includes accommodations at selected hotels, daily continental breakfast, and sightseeing tours.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Zurich, Meals: N/A
- Arrive in Zurich, Switzerland
- Welcome to Zurich! On arrival in Zurich, you will walk across to the Flughafen station (located adjacent to the airport) for your train to Zurich. On arrival at Zurich station make your way to the hotel. Check-in at the hotel at 15:00 hrs. Rest of the day is free at leisure.

**Day 2:** Lucerne, Meals: Breakfast
- Zurich to Lucerne by train
- Breakfast at the hotel. Later explore Zurich on a city tour. This panoramic tour takes you across the famous Bahnhofstrasse and the banking center of the lake with a view of the snow-capped mountains, part of the old town with its magnificent guild houses and the churches St. Peter, Grossmünster and Fraumünster. You’ll see the university quarter and the residential area Zurichberg, the National Museum and the Kunsthaus.
- Later transfer on your own to the Zurich station for your onward journey to Lucerne. On arrival at Lucerne station transfer on your own to hotel and check-in. Rest of the day is free at leisure or explore Lucerne on your own.

**Day 3:** Lucerne, Meals: Breakfast
- Lucerne to Mt Titlis
- Breakfast at the hotel. Don't miss the spectacular beauty of Mt Titlis! Discover eternal glaciers and other attractions from more than 3020m / 10000 ft high. Enjoy the spectacular sight of the glacier's deep crevasses and gigantic ice boulders from the revolving cable car ROTAIR. At the top of Mt. Titlis (10'000 ft. above sea level), a high alpine panorama awaits you. Visit the Ice Grotto or take a ride with the chairlift IceFlyer, which brings you close to the crevasses. Enjoy also the FunLift in the snow and the Cliff Walk, Europe's highest suspension bridge.

**Day 4:** Interlaken, Meals: Breakfast
- Lucerne to Interlaken by train
- Post breakfast check out of the hotel and transfer on your own to Lucerne Station for your onward journey to Interlaken, heart of the Bernese Oberland. Upon your arrival you will proceed to the hotel and recoup. The day is free. OR take an adventure excursion in Interlaken or visit Harder Kulm; Interlaken’s home mountain and enjoy panoramic views.

**Day 5:** Interlaken, Meals: Breakfast
- Interlaken to Jungfraujoch
- Post breakfast at the hotel, Don't miss the highlight of any Swiss holiday and join us for this thrilling and unforgettable fully guided excursion to Jungfraujoch, Top of Europe! From Interlaken, the heart of the Jungfrau region mountain world and uniquely situated between two lakes, we make your way to famous mountain resort Grindelwald where you board the cogwheel train for a spectacular ride via Kleine Scheidegg to Jungfraujoch. Enjoy stunning views of the world-famous triple peaks of Eiger, Monch and Jungfrau accompany you all the way to the top.

**Day 6:** Montreux, Meals: Breakfast
- Interlaken to Montreux by train
- Breakfast at the hotel and later with the help of the Swiss Pass make your journey to the final Destination in Swiss; Montreux. The town of Montreux nestles in a sheltered Lake Geneva bay, surrounded by vineyards and against the breathtaking backdrop of snow-covered Alps. On arrival at Montreux and proceed on your own to hotel.

**Day 7:** Montreux, Meals: Breakfast
- Montreux - Glacier 3000
- Post breakfast escape to the high Alps to breathe a fresh air and spectacular mountain vistas on the Glacier 3000 (Mountain Excursion). Glacier 3000, located at the highest point of the Vaudois Alps, is open all year round for winter activities for all! With its stunning views and wide range of activities on offer – including the Peak Walk, a unique suspension bridge linking two mountain peaks – Glacier 3000 is a must for your holidays in Switzerland.
- OR Enjoy a splendid “Bollywood Tour” - Gstaad region is known as one of the most scenic natural film sets in the world. Many Bollywood blockbusters have been filmed here, such as DDLJ “Bachana Ae Haseenno” and many more. Lunch is included as a part of this tour.

**Day 8:** Montreux, Meals: Breakfast
- Depart Montreux
- Post breakfast make your way to Montreux Train station and with the help of the Swiss Pass head to the airport. Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback with our representative or via email - as your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your overseas tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Grand Bargain Tour Of Europe - Disneyland With 3N Mediterranean Cruise (Summer 2024)' package is an 18-day tour that offers a comprehensive and exciting experience in Europe, covering 7 countries and exploring iconic cities, cultural landmarks, and breathtaking natural beauty. The itinerary includes visits to London, Paris, Brussels, Amsterdam, Cologne, Zurich, Innsbruck, Ferrara, Padova, and Savona, with an included 3-night Mediterranean cruise. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city excursions, and scenic cruises, as well as the opportunity to explore the local culture and history of each destination. With a focus on quality and comfort, this tour offers an unforgettable experience for travelers of all ages.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** London, Meals: Dinner, Description: Welcome to London
On arrival, our Tour Manager / Local Representative will meet and welcome you outside the airport. Later, we proceed to the hotel and check–in.

**Day 2:** London, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Guided city tour of London - Madame Tussauds wax museum - Ride on London Eye
Today, we proceed on a guided city tour of London: See the Buckingham Palace, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge and Thames River. Next, visit the famous Madame Tussauds wax museum. Later, enjoy a ride on the London Eye.

**Day 3:** Paris, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Ride on the Eurostar – Guided city tour of Paris – Eiffel Tower (2nd Level)
Today, we proceed to St. Pancras station to board the Eurostar. On arrival in Paris, proceed for a guided city tour: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides and Champs Elysees. Later, visit the Eiffel tower (Level 2).

**Day 4:** Paris, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Disneyland Paris (01 Day 01 Park) – Illumination Tour
Today, we proceed to Disneyland Paris where you can visit Disneyland Park OR Walt Disney Studios Park (Up to 5 Hour Visit). Get charmed by Sleeping Beauty Castle, enjoy exciting rollercoaster rides, meet Alice in Wonderland, Pinocchio and others in Fantasyland as well as travelling to the four corners of the globe in Adventureland. After dinner, we enjoy ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the city’s famous monuments / sights light up.

**Day 5:** Brussels, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Mini Europe - Orientation tour of Brussels
Today, we proceed to Brussels and visit Mini Europe - Europe in Miniature. Later, we proceed for an orientation tour of Brussels: See the Grand Place with free time and photo stop at the Manneken Pis statue.

**Day 6:** Amsterdam, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner, Description: Till 12th May: Keukenhof - Amsterdam canal cruise
Today, we proceed to Keukenhof - the largest spring garden in the world. Later, we enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass-topped boat.

**Day 7:** Rhineland, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Cologne Cathedral - Rhine River cruise
Today, we drive to Cologne and visit the Cologne Cathedral. Later, we enjoy a scenic cruise on the River Rhine.

**Day 8:** Zurich, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Black Forest - View Rhine Falls
Today, we drive in the heart of the Black forest region, known for its dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages. Next, we drive to Schaffhausen in Switzerland to see the Rhine falls.

**Day 9:** Zurich, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Day at leisure OR Excursion to Jungfraujoch with lunch and Interlaken (Optional)
Today, the day is at leisure OR you can join us for a visit to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe. We board the cable car followed by a cogwheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station. Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps. Later, we visit Interlaken.

**Day 10:** Zurich, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner, Description: Visit Mt. Titlis - Orientation tour of Lucerne
Today, we visit Mt Titlis. Our cable car ride includes the world's first rotating cable car, the Rotair - to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters. Do visit the "Cliff Walk" a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis. Next, we proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives and chocolates.

**Day 11:** Innsbruck, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner, Description: Orientation tour of Innsbruck - Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop
Today, we drive to Innsbruck. On arrival, we enjoy an orientation tour: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse. Next, we visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop in Wattens.

**Day 12:** Ferrara, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner, Description: Orientation tour of Venice
Today, we drive to Italy and proceed to the pier to take a private boat to Venice. On arrival, we visit St. Mark’s square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 13:** Arezzo, Meals: Breakfast, Local Lunch, and Dinner, Description: Guided city tour of Florence
Today, we proceed to Florence for a guided walking tour: see the Duomo, the Campanile, the Baptistery with its Gates of Paradise and Piazza Della Signoria.

**Day 14:** Arezzo, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Day trip to Rome - Guided tour of Vatican Museum and Sistine Chapel - Guided city tour of Rome
Today, we proceed for a guided city tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City - the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed) including a visit to the Vatican Museum, Sistine Chapel, St. Peter’s Basilica and St. Peter’s Square. Next, we continue with the guided city tour of Rome: See Circus Maximus and photo-stop at Colosseum & Arc Of Constantine.

**Day 15:** Mediterranean Cruise, Meals: Breakfast at the hotel, Dinner On-board the Cruise, Description: See Leaning Tower of Pisa – Savona - Proceed for the Cruise (Departure Time: 18:00 hrs.)
Today, we drive to Pisa. On arrival, we visit the Square of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Next, we drive to proceed to Savona to board the Cruise. After embarkation you can walk around the ship. Enjoy a meal at the buffet deck or sip a drink at any of the lounges.

**Day 16:** Mediterranean Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise, Description: Barcelona
Arrive in Barcelona. After breakfast, you can enjoy the on-board amenities such as swimming pool, jacuzzi, gaming zone OR proceed for sightseeing in Barcelona, with our recommended shore excursions.

**Day 17:** Mediterranean Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise, Description: Marseilles
Arrive in Marseilles. After breakfast, you can enjoy the on-board amenities such as swimming pool, jacuzzi, gaming zone OR proceed for sightseeing in Marseilles, with our recommended shore excursions.

**Day 18:** Mediterranean Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Savona – Disembarkation Time: 09:30 hrs. (ship time) – Fly back with pleasant memories!
Arrive in Savona. After breakfast or brunch, disembark and proceed to Milan Airport for your return Journey.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights Of Scandinavia Fjord Cruise With 4 Nights Denmark' package is a 12-day tour that takes you through the beautiful cities of Copenhagen and other Scandinavian destinations. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as Rosklide Cathedral, Viking Ship Museum, and Egeskov Castle, as well as a fjord cruise that offers breathtaking views of Norway's coastline. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a guided city tour of Copenhagen and a canal cruise. Meals included are daily continental buffet breakfast and 4 Indian Jain / vegetarian / non-vegetarian lunches. The tour also includes return economy class group airfare, all local taxes and services, cost of visa and medical insurance, sightseeing and accommodation, and all transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Copenhagen, Meals: Dinner
- Welcome to Copenhagen. 
- On arrival, our Tour Manager / Station Manager will meet and welcome you outside the airport. 
- Later we proceed to the hotel and check-in.

**Day 2:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Rosklide – Visit the Viking Ship Museum – See the Rosklide Cathedral
- Today, we proceed to Rosklide. Once the capital of Denmark, Roskilde oozes of history with a picturesque location by the fjord and rich historical heritage. 
- We visit the Viking Ship Museum which offers an incredible insight into the world of the Vikings and their era. 
- You will be amazed by the five original Viking vessels from the 11th-century, as well as "The Glendalough Sea Stallion". 
- Next we see the Rosklide Cathedral. Built in 1170, it is the first gothic cathedral in Scandinavia and is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. 
- The cathedral also houses the Royal Mausoleum. Here, 39 Danish kings and queens lie in sarcophagi and monuments.

**Day 3:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner
- Orientation of Odense – Visit the Hans Christian Anderson House – Visit Egeskov Castle
- Today, we proceed to Odense, one of Denmarks oldest cities and the hometown of Hans Christian Andersen – the famous fairy tale writer. 
- His most famous fairy tales include "The Emperor's New Clothes", "The Little Mermaid", "The Ugly Duckling", "Thumbelina" and many more. 
- On arrival we proceed on an orientation tour. 
- Next we visit the Hans Christian Anderson House for a surprising and fascinating journey into the author’s creative universe – and his beloved fairy tales. 
- Later, we proceed to visit Egeskov Castle, one of Europe's best preserved water castle.

**Day 4-10:** Fjord Cruise, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner On-board the Cruise
- Today, we drive on the Oresund bridge and tunnel to proceed to the city of Malmo, Sweden's third largest city, 
- On a brief Orientation we stop for a photo-op of the turning torso and Oresund bridge. 
- Later, we proceed to the port to board your cruise. 
- After embarkation you can walk around the ship. 
- Enjoy a meal at the buffet deck or sip a drink at any of the lounges. 
- The evening goes with watching one of the featured Broadway show or dinner at any of the restaurants. 
- You can also find a variety of entertainment such as a piano bar, casino or a dance band in one of the bars.

**Day 11:** Copenhagen, Meals: Cruise Breakfast and Dinner
- Guided city tour of Copenhagen – Canal Cruise
- Today, after disembarking, we proceed for a guided city tour of Copenhagen: 
- See the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue and many other interesting sights. 

**Day 12:** Copenhagen, Meals: Breakfast
- Departure from Copenhagen Fly back home with pleasant memories!
- After breakfast, proceed to the Copenhagen Airport for your return Journey. 
- Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. 
- Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. 
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit Solvang, Danish Village – Visit Santa Monica Beach – Onto Los Angeles “City of Angels”
Today, drive to Solvang - "A little Denmark in Southern California". Visit the quaint town and see the traditional houses and windmills. Later, visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches. Also, visit Third Street Promenade, a shopping, dining and entertainment complex. Later, drive to Los Angeles.
 
**Day 4:** Los Angeles, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit Universal Studios. Visit Hollywood Boulevard. Orientation Tour of Los Angeles.
Today, visit the Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars. Go on the legendry Studio Tram Tour. Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more. Experience the ‘Wizarding World of Harry Potter’. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Los Angeles.  Visit the Main Street in Hollywood -“Hollywood Boulevard” walk along the Hollywood Walk of Fame, the Dolby Theatre which hosts the Oscars. Also see the TCL Chinese theatre. Later, drive through Sunset Boulevard, Beverly Hills and many more sights.
 
**Day 5:** Las Vegas, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Drive to Las Vegas- the gambling capital of the world. Ride on the Las Vegas High Roller.
Today, drive to Las Vegas. On arrival, check-in to your hotel. Later, explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.  Later, this evening ride on the High Roller – one of the world’s largest observation wheel.
 
**Day 6:** Las Vegas, Meals: Packed Breakfast and Dinner, Description: 
Day is at Leisure OR a Chance to visit the Majestic Grand Canyon –Open Bus tour to experience Las Vegas by Night.
Today, the entire day is free for you to explore the themed hotels and shopping centres on your own. 
OR, avail one of the optional tours of the Grand Canyon.
Later, on your ‘Vegas by Night Tour’ Cruise the Las Vegas Strip in an open  bus to see top Las Vegas sights lit by dazzling neon lights. Since this evening bus tour covers key areas in downtown and the Strip, it’s a great way to get your bearings in Las Vegas. Next, visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks! 
 
**Day 7:** Niagara Falls, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Fly to Buffalo - Niagara Falls By Night.
Today, fly to Buffalo. Upon arrival, drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel. Later, visit Niagara Falls by night. 
 
**Day 8:** Harrisburg, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Niagara Falls - Ride the Maid of the Mist. 
Today after checkout, take a boat ride aboard the Maid of The Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder. (Due to weather conditions, this ride usually operates after the last week of May. We offer the ‘Niagara Scenic Trolley’ instead, for all tourists visiting the falls prior to the commencement of this ride). Later, drive to Harrisburg.
 
**Day 9:** Washington D.c., Meals: Brunch, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Hershey’s Chocolate World – “Experience make your own chocolate tour”. - Guided City Tour of Washington D.C. - Visit Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History.
Today, after checkout proceeds to visit the Hershey’s Chocolate World a place to experience the chocolate making adventure, you will get to learn how to make chocolate and desserts. Next, proceed to Washington DC. On arrival, visit the Smithsonian National Natural History Museum. Later, proceed on Guided City tour of Washington D.C.; See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.
 
**Day 10:** New Jersey, Meals: Breakfast, Veg Lunch and Dinner, Description: 
Drive to New York City - Visit to Swami Narayan Temple with Lunch. Guided tour of New York City. Buggy Ride.
Today, drive to New York City. Upon arrival, proceed to enjoy beauty, peace and exquisite Indian architecture at Shri Swaminarayan Mandir and have all-vegetarian cuisine to experience some traditional and authentic tastes of India. Later we take on a guided city tour of Manhattan, drive past Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, Central Park and many more sights. Later, Ramp up the romance and magic on your trip to NYC with a carriage ride around Central Park, See Central Park how it was originally designed to be traveled: by horse-drawn carriage! Later check-in at the hotel post dinner.
 
**Day 11:** New Jersey, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner - Meal Card, Description: 
Visit the Statue of Liberty. Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory. Visit Times Square.
Today, take a ferry to Liberty Island to view the magnificent “Statue of Liberty”. Later, Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt, this observatory blends elements of art, technology, architecture, and thrill to take the concept of “observation deck” to entirely new heights. Next, experience New York’s iconic landmark the Times Square.
 
**Day 12:** Orlando, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Onto Orlando - The Fun Capital of the world.
Today, proceed to the Airport for your flight to Orlando.  On arrival, proceed to the hotel for check-in. Rest of the day is free for you to explore this city on your own.
 
**Day 13:** Orlando, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit Epcot at Walt Disney World.
Today, step into a world of fantasy as you proceed to Visit the popular Walt Disney’s Epcot - It’s the ultimate mix of futuristic technology and entertainment. There are fun filled hands-on activities that will appeal to the junior and seniors both.  Enjoy the various rides and shows. Also step into the Future World and experience the World Showcase.
 
**Day 14:** Orlando, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to “NASA”- Kennedy Space Centre Visitors Complex. Free time for shopping.
Today, proceed to the Kennedy Space Centre’s Visitors Complex of National Aeronautics and Space Administration. Visit space exploration, space shuttle simulators, enjoy 3D shows at IMAX Theater and see Space shuttle Atlantis up close. Later get on a bus tour and visit Launch Complex, site of many Apollo and space shuttle launches.
 
**Day 15:** Orlando, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Bid farewell
Today, proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Summary:** The 'West Bengal - Sunderban National Park 3N' package is a 4-day tour that covers the beautiful Sunderban National Park in West Bengal. The itinerary includes visits to the Sunderban Tiger Camp, where guests can experience the true Sunderban, learn about the lifestyle, local crafts, cuisines, and way of life of the local villagers, and observe the birdlife within the resort. The tour also includes a thrilling cruise into the Sunderban Tiger Reserve Forest through creeks and rivers, visits to the Dobanke Watch Tower and Pakhiralay Island, and a Bonbibi Yatra cultural show. **Day 2:** Sunderban, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner

- Visit Pakhiralay Island in the afternoon.

**Day 4:** Sunderban, Meals: Breakfast

- Walk through the caged walkways and search for the elusive tiger.
- Cruise back to Sunderban Tiger Camp for an early lunch.
- Return to Kolkata Airport / Railway Station for onward journey.

**Summary:**
The 'Grand Bargain With National Parks' package is a 19-day tour that takes you through the breathtaking cities of San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Kanab, Moab, Salt Lake City, Yellowstone National Park, Niagara Falls, Harrisburg, Washington D.C., New Jersey, and New York City. This tour offers an incredible experience with guided tours, scenic drives, and exciting activities, including visits to iconic landmarks, national parks, and cultural attractions. Participants will enjoy daily buffet breakfast, packed breakfast, Indian breakfast, basic Indian Jain/ vegetarian/ non-vegetarian lunches, and international vegetarian/non-vegetarian dinners, along with a meal card for dinner in New York. The tour also includes sightseeing, excursions, meals, and accommodations as per the above-mentioned itinerary.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** San Francisco, Meals: Dinner, Description: San Francisco
Welcome to San Francisco. On arrival, proceed to your hotel and check-in on your own. The rest of the day is free for you to experience the pulse of this city on your own.

**Day 2:** San Francisco, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Guided City Tour - Enjoy Bay Cruise - Visit Sausalito.
Today, proceed for a guided city tour of San Francisco. See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks. Later, drive across the Golden Gate Bridge and visit the town of Sausalito, the most well-known waterfront community in California. Next, enjoy San Francisco Bay Cruise as you sail past the San Francisco skyline the famous Alcatraz Island and the Golden Gate Bridge.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit Solvang, Danish Village – Visit Santa Monica Beach – Onto Los Angeles “City of Angels”
Today, drive to Solvang - "A little Denmark in Southern California". Visit the quaint town and see the traditional houses and windmills. Later, visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches. Also, visit Third Street Promenade, a shopping, dining and entertainment complex. Later, drive to Los Angeles.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit Universal Studios. Visit Hollywood Boulevard. Orientation Tour of Los Angeles.
Today, visit the Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars. Go on the legendry Studio Tram Tour. Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more. Experience the ‘Wizarding World of Harry Potter’. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Los Angeles. Visit the Main Street in Hollywood -“Hollywood Boulevard” walk along the Hollywood Walk of Fame, the Dolby Theatre which hosts the Oscars. Also see the TCL Chinese theatre. Later, drive through Sunset Boulevard, Beverly Hills and many more sights.

**Day 5:** Las Vegas, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Drive to Las Vegas- the gambling capital of the world. Ride on the Las Vegas High Roller.
Today, drive to Las Vegas. On arrival, check-in to your hotel. Later, explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street. Later, this evening ride on the High Roller – one of the world’s largest observation wheel.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas, Meals: Packed Breakfast and Dinner, Description:
Day is at Leisure OR a Chance to visit the Majestic Grand Canyon –Open Bus tour to experience Las Vegas by Night.
Today, the entire day is free for you to explore the themed hotels and shopping centres on your own.
OR, avail one of the optional tours of the Grand Canyon.
Later, on your ‘Vegas by Night Tour’ Cruise the Las Vegas Strip in an open bus to see top Las Angeles sights lit by dazzling neon lights. Since this evening bus tour covers key areas in downtown and the Strip, it’s a great way to get your bearings in Las Angeles. Next, visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks.

**Day 7:** Los Angeles, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to Hollywood Walk of Fame - Visit the iconic TCL Chinese Theatre
Today, the entire day is free for you to explore the themed hotels and shopping centres on your own.
OR, visit the iconic TCL Chinese Theatre, where you can see the handprints of the biggest stars in Hollywood, and visit the Hollywood Walk of Fame.

**Day 8:** Kanab, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to Zion National Park & Bryce Canyon.
Today, after breakfast, check out and proceed to the Zion National Park in Utah. This expansive canyon averaging 2,000 feet in depth. Here, marvel at dramatic landscape of colourful deep canyons, high cliffs, mesas, forested plateaus and spectacular natural rock arches. Next, we visit Bryce Canyon National Park, famous for the worlds largest collection of “hoodoos” the distinctive rock formations. Later, proceed to Kanab.

**Day 9:** Moab, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to Antelope Canyon & Monument Valley.
Today, after breakfast, check out and proceed to Antelope Canyon. Its magnificent smooth and flowing shaped sandstone has made it one of the most-photographed and most-visited slot canyons in the world. On a guided tour see the stunning colours & formations. Later, we proceed to Monument Valley. Here you will see the sky, bigger and bluer than you remembered. You’ll see the earth, red, rough and unpredictable. It is said to be one of the most photographed places on earth and is frequently a filming location for Western movies.

**Day 10:** Salt Lake City, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to Arches National Park & Guided tour of Salt Lake City
Today, check out and drive to Visit Arches National park which contains about 2,000 windowed arches, towering spires, harrowing hoodoos and precarious pinnacles. Later, we drive to Salt Lake City. On arrival proceed for a guided city tour; see the historic monuments like Temple Square, State Capitol Building, Governor’s mansion, Brigham Young’s Beehive House, and more. Later, proceed to the hotel & check in.

**Day 11:** Yellowstone National Park, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Visit to Grand Teton National Park & Onto Yellowstone National Park.
Today, check out and proceed to Grand Teton National Park - one of the most scenic national parks in the world, with the magnificent Teton Range being the center of attention. On arrival, we take you on guided tour of National Park where you will see Signal Mountain, Jackson Lake, Willow Flats, Elk Ranch Flats, Snake River Overlook, and many more. Also view amazing wildlife including Bears, Bison, Elk, Moose and Wolves. Later, we drive to Yellowstone National Park - known for its dramatic canyons, alpine rivers, hot springs and gushing geysers. It’s also home to hundreds of animal species, including bears, wolves, bison, elk and antelope. On arrival, proceed to the hotel & check in.

**Day 12:** Yellowstone National Park, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Full day tour of Yellowstone Lower Loop.
Today, proceed on a full day tour of the Lower Loop, which offers most popular attractions. You can see natural thermal wonders like Old Faithful Geyser in all its glory, and even witness the yellow rocks that give Yellowstone its name. Admire the spectacular Lower Falls, almost twice as high as the Niagara Falls. Next, stop at Fountain Paint Pots to see the bubbling mud.

**Day 13:** Niagara Falls, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Fly to Buffalo
Today, fly to Buffalo. Upon arrival, drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel. Overnight in Niagara.

**Day 14:** Niagara Falls, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Day Free to exploe city on own. Niagara Falls By Night.
Today, fly to Buffalo. Upon arrival, drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel. Later, visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 15:** Harrisburg, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Niagara Falls - Ride the Maid of the Mist.
Today after checkout, take a boat ride aboard the Maid of The Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder. (Due to weather conditions, this ride usually operates after the last week of May. We offer the ‘Niagara Scenic Trolley’ instead, for all tourists visiting the falls prior to the commencement of this ride). Later, drive to Harrisburg.

**Day 16:** Washington D.C., Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Hershey’s Chocolate World – “Experience make your own chocolate tour”. - Guided City Tour of Washington D.C. - Visit Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History.
Today, after checkout proceeds to visit the Hershey’s Chocolate World a place to experience the chocolate making adventure, you will get to learn how to make chocolate and desserts. Next, proceed to Washington DC. On arrival, visit the Smithsonian National Natural History Museum. Later, proceed on Guided City tour of Washington D.C.; See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.

**Day 17:** New Jersey, Meals: Breakfast, Veg Lunch and Dinner, Description: Drive to New York City - Visit to Swami Narayan Temple with Lunch. Guided tour of New York City. Buggy Ride.
Today, drive to New York City. Upon arrival, proceed to enjoy beauty, peace and exquisite Indian architecture at Shri Swaminarayan Mandir and have all-vegetarian cuisine to experience some traditional and authentic tastes of India. Later we take on a guided city tour of Manhattan, drive past Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, Central Park and many more sights. Later, Ramp up the romance and magic on your trip to NYC with a carriage ride around Central Park, See Central Park how it was originally designed to be traveled: by horse-drawn carriage! Later check-in at the hotel post dinner.

**Day 18:** New Jersey, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner - Meal Card, Description: Visit the Statue of Liberty. Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory. Visit Times Square.
Today, take a ferry to Liberty Island to view the magnificent “Statue of Liberty”. Later, Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt, this observatory blends elements of art, technology, architecture, and thrill to take the concept of “observation deck” to entirely new heights. Next, experience New York’s iconic landmark the Times Square.

**Day 19:** New Jersey, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Bid farewell
Today, proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Summary:** The 'Majestic Mongolia' package is a 6-day tour that covers the beautiful cities of Ulaanbaatar, Hustai National Park, and Bayan Gobi sand dunes in Mongolia. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Giant Chinggis Statue complex, Sukhbaatar Square, and Erdene Khamba Buddhist surviving temple. Participants will enjoy guided tours, horseback riding, camel riding, and a range of exciting activities, including a visit to a nomadic family stay and the Cango Caves. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Ulaanbaatar, Meals: N/A, Description: Arrival in Ulaanbaatar
Welcome to Ulaanbaatar - The coldest capital in the World!
Upon arrival at the airport, pick up from airport and transfer to your hotel. Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.)
Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Nomadic Family Stay, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Bayan Gobi sand dunes
Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
Later, drive to Bayan gobi (Elsen Tasarkhai) and Khugnu Khan nature reserve where the gorgeous rocky mountain and mini version of sand dunes are. Upon arrival, we will visit a camel breeder family which is a great way to learn more about nomadic lifestyle and people of Mongolia. Enjoy 1 hour camel riding by the sand dune areas. Subsequently, visit the Erdene Khamba Buddhist surviving temple from the Great Repression in the 1930s in the Nature Reserve.

**Day 3:** Urguu Camp, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Ancient capital Karakorum
Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
Today, we will drive to Orkhon River Valley, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Our scenic drive will span approximately 4-5 hours, taking us through the central Mongolian steppes before we reach the historical Orkhon valley.
Upon arrival, we'll visit the renowned Erdene Zuu Monastery, a historic landmark founded in 1586 and the very first Buddhist monastery in Central Mongolia. Additionally, we'll explore the Museum of Karakorum, which provides valuable insights into the history of Central Mongolia & the mighty Mongol Empire.

**Day 4:** Hutsai Ger Camp, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Hustai National Park
Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
Today, we will drive to Hustai National Park, where the Takhi wild horses graze peacefully with other wild animals. Arrive and check in to a ger camp. Then we head into the Hustai national park to spot the wild horse known as Takhi (Equus Przewalski) and other wildlife. Enjoy 1 hour horseback riding around the national park.

**Day 5:** Ulaanbaatar, Meals: Breakfast and Lunch, Description: Ger Camp - Ulaanbaatar
Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
Head to Ulaanbaatar. On the way, we will stop at the Giant Chinggis Statue complex, the tallest equestrian statue in the world. Upon arrival, we will visit Sukhbaatar Square, and the National History Museum where we'll delve into the history of Genghis Khan's empire-building, a pivotal chapter in Mongolia's past.

**Day 6:** Ulaanbaatar, Meals: Breakfast, Description: Departure
Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Meghalaya - Explore Shillong With Taj Hotels' package is a 5-day tour that covers the beautiful city of Shillong in Meghalaya, India. The itinerary includes visits to iconic landmarks such as the Umiam Lake or Barapani, Cathedral of Marry, and the Ward’s Lake. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and a range of exciting activities, including a trek to the nearby Rewai Village and a boat river ride on the Umngot river. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Shillong, Meals: NA, Description: 
Guwahati Airport - Shillong (130 KMS / 3 ½ hrs drive)
Welcome on arrival in Guwahati Airport/Station and drive to Shillong. En route witness the Umiam Lake or Barapani - is the biggest artificial lake in Meghalaya in midst of sylvan hills adorned by Khasi pines and peerless beauty. If time permits visit Cathedral of Marry and Ward’s Lake. Evening free at leisure to explore the region on own. You may take a walk to the famous Police Bazaar for shopping. Overnight in Shillong., GeoLocation: (Lat: 25.578773, Lon: 91.893254).

**Day 2:** Shillong, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Shillong – Cherrapunjee – Shillong (60 km / 2 Hrs - One way):
After breakfast drive to Cherrapunjee, the wettest place on the earth, for an awesome day trip. En route visit the famous Elephant Falls. At Sohra, stop at the Duwan Sing Syiem view point for mesmerizing views of the Hills. In Cherrapunjee be witness to the gorgeous Seven Sisters (Nohsngithiang) Falls and Nohkalikai Falls. Later take a soft cave walk inside the Mawsmai Cave. The limestone cave is a natural wonder with innumerable formations inside it. Also visit the Ramakrishna Mission. Drive back to Shillong for overnight stay. Note: Most of the waterfalls are dry during winter season., GeoLocation: (Lat: 25.578773, Lon: 91.893254).

**Day 3:** Shillong, Meals: Breakfast , Description: 
Shillong - Mwallynong - Shillong (100 km/ 3 hrs/ one way):
After breakfast drive to Mwallynong, the cleanest village in Asia, also known as ‘God’s own Garden’. With over 80 households, the village gives the ambiance of walking in a well maintained park! Climb the 80 ft Sky Walk at Mawlynnong village for a bird’s eye view of the Village, the plantations and faraway plains of Bangladesh. You will also be acquainted to the Khasi lifestyle, their culture and economy. A trek to the nearby Rewai Village is another interesting activity. Walk down a flight of almost 100 steps to witness nature’s wonder, living-root bridge. The bridges are tangles of massive thick roots, which the local people inter-twine to form a bridge that can hold several people at a time. The root bridges, may be up to over a hundred feet long and take ten to fifteen years to become fully functional, but they become very strong in the process. The useful lifespan of the bridges, is thought to be 500–600 years. Later drive to Dawki, a village of the Jaintia community whose prime occupation of fishing. Be mesmerized by the beauty of the Umngot river, also famous for its crystal clear water, so clear that when seen from a distance, it appears as if the boat is floating in mid-air! The Umngot river is the natural boundary between Ri Pnar or Jaintia Hills with Hima Khyrim of Khasi hills over which is a single span suspension bridge was constructed. This is the gateway to Bangladesh where major export and import transactions take place. Enjoy an amazing country boat river ride. Drive up to the Bangladesh border. Later proceed to Shillong for overnight stay., GeoLocation: (Lat: 25.578773, Lon: 91.893254).

**Day 4:** Shillong, Meals: Breakfast, Description: 
Day Trip to Jowai:
After breakfast, proceed for a day trip to Jowai. Be witness to the Nartiang Monoliths, a cluster of monoliths which stand as a testimony of Jaintia rulers’ strength. Also visit the Nartiang Durga Temple, a 500-year-old Mandir. It is one of the 51 Shakti Peethas of Hindu Mythology. Also witness the Krangsuri Falls for breath-taking views. Later drive to Shillong. Overnight in Shillong., GeoLocation: (Lat: 25.578773, Lon: 91.893254).

**Day 5:** Shillong, Meals: Breakfast , Description: 
Guwahati Airport Departure:
